workflow_analysis: The workflow demonstrates the process of using Grok on Twitter to draft and potentially post a tweet. The user navigates to Twitter, interacts with the Grok Assistant, and inputs a draft for a tweet. The input schema includes a required input for the tweet content. This accounts for the dynamic nature of the tweet's message, as the user's input defines the content.
name: Tweet Draft and Post via Grok
description: This workflow automates the process of drafting and posting a tweet using the Grok Assistant on Twitter.

steps.description: Click on the Grok Assistant navigation link.
Type the tweet content into the Grok assistant's text area.
